title: EventMessage
description: EventMessage: Class to store an event raised during the execution on a TestResult.

Status.description: Severity of the message. TestStatus: Defines the status of the Test Information. Designed to be very clear, concrete statuses, with minimal ambiguity.

StackTrace.description: Original location where the event was generated.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
